# Jankélévitch

*1903 – 1985 · French*

French philosopher of morality and music. On forgiveness: he refuses cheap forgiveness; some crimes, met with no repentance, remain unforgivable, and to forgive them would betray the victims.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
